text.title: AI-Generated Test Audit Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the filled checklist artefact, with valid + invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.code: { "pr_id": "#482", "reviewer": "ruslan", "run_at": "2026-05-23T10:00:00Z", "items": [ {"item_id": 1, "verdict": "pass"}, {"item_id": 2, "verdict": "flag", "verdict_note": "missing 5xx case", "repair_request": "add test for upstream 503"}, {"item_id": 3, "verdict": "pass"}, {"item_id": 4, "verdict": "pass"}, {"item_id": 5, "verdict": "n/a", "verdict_note": "no string inputs"}, {"item_id": 6, "verdict": "pass"}, {"item_id": 7, "verdict": "pass"}, {"item_id": 8, "verdict": "pass"}, {"item_id": 9, "verdict": "pass"}, {"item_id": 10, "verdict": "pass"}, {"item_id": 11, "verdict": "pass"}, {"item_id": 12, "verdict": "n/a", "verdict_note": "mutation CI not yet adopted"} ], "overall_verdict": "request_changes", "pre_lint_results": {"mocks_per_test_max": 2, "structural_only_count": 0} }

example.note: items length < 12; item 1 flagged without repair_request; overall_verdict=approve while item 1 is flag (forbidden).

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: overall_verdict == approve while any item.verdict == flag
items has fewer than 12 entries or duplicate item_id
